notes: Use official role-specific pages. Do not rely on generic career landing pages. Confirm multilingual team expectations separately from hard language requirements. Current dataset uses official company/engineering pages as source anchors and marks salary, exact location, and language requirements as missing until role-specific pages verify them. Also verify job posting URL, opening status, hiring period, application deadline, qualification summary, job description summary, and selection process before raising source confidence.
